---
draft: true
engine: markdown
---

I'm just using this to test some of the features of marginal effects. Let's do this by importing some data:

```{r}
pacman::p_load(marginaleffects,ggeffects,tidyverse, skimr)
```

```{r}
data(efc, package = "ggeffects")
efc$c172code <- datawizard::to_factor(efc$c172code)
```

```{r}
efc <- efc %>% mutate(barthtot_dichot = if_else(barthtot > median(efc$barthtot, na.rm=TRUE),1,0))
```

```{r}
fit <- glm(c175empl ~ c12hour + neg_c_7 + c172code, data = efc, family = "binomial")
dat <- predict_response(fit, terms = c("c12hour [all]", "c172code"))
plot(dat, facets = TRUE, show_data = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#make a regression on barthot using c12hour and c172code
fit <- glm(barthtot ~ c12hour + neg_c_7 +c172code, data = efc, family = "gaussian")
dat <- predict_response(fit, terms = c("c12hour", "c172code"))
plot(dat, facets = TRUE, show_data = TRUE)
```
